I am writing to you to let you know that the Power Marketing Association (PMA) has 
reached an agreement with the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) to provide 
financial support to the CPUC in its efforts to implement the California Energy 
Initiative (CEI).  The PMA has agreed to provide $1 million to the CPUC to support the

California retail electricity

I'm going to the game, and I thought I'd share this with you.  It's a creepy 
music box that plays the Notre Dame fight song.  It's located in the lobby of the 
University of Notre Dame.  It's a little creepy, but it's pretty cool.  It's located at 
the corner of South and South Wolfe.  It's a little hard to find, but it's worth it.

representative in Congress and urge him to support the legislation that will be introduced 
this week.

are not overcharged
